title: ICMPv6 implementation (echo, errors)
description:
Implement ICMPv6 messages for basic diagnostics.

Message types:
- Echo Request (type 128)
- Echo Reply (type 129)
- Destination Unreachable (type 1)
- Packet Too Big (type 2)
- Time Exceeded (type 3)

ICMPv6 header:
- type (1 byte)
- code (1 byte)
- checksum (2 bytes)
- message body

Checksum calculation:
- Pseudo-header (src, dst, length, next_header=58)
- ICMPv6 header + body

Classes:
- ICMPv6Message base class
- EchoRequest, EchoReply
- DestinationUnreachable, etc.

Handler:
- async handle_icmpv6(packet) -> response | None
- Respond to echo requests
- Generate errors when needed
close_reason: Implemented in python/src/lichen/ipv6/icmpv6.py: Echo Request/Reply, Dest Unreachable/Packet Too Big/Time Exceeded, RFC 4443 pseudo-header checksum, handle_icmpv6 echo responder. 14 tests, hand-computed checksum oracle. ruff clean.
